00230|                 }

00232|         
00233|         # Calculate waste and savings
00234|         cursor.execute(f'''
00235|             SELECT

00237|                 SUM(CASE WHEN auto_controlled = FALSE AND power_watts > 5 THEN power_watts ELSE 0 END) as waste_power,
00238|                 SUM(CASE WHEN auto_controlled = TRUE THEN power_watts ELSE 0 END) as saved_power,
00239|                 COUNT(*) as total_readings
00240|             FROM electricity_data 
00241|             WHERE {date_filter}

00243|         ''')
00244|         
00245|         devices_data = cursor.fetchall()
00246|         
00247|         # Calculate monetary values (assuming $0.12 per kWh)
00248|         cost_per_kwh = 0.12  # Default: $0.12 per kWh, can be made configurable
00249|         total_waste = 0

00257|             # Convert to kWh (assuming readings are per hour)
00258|             waste_kwh = (waste_power / 1000) * 24
00259|             saved_kwh = (saved_power / 1000) * 24
00260|             
00261|             waste_cost = waste_kwh * cost_per_kwh
00262|             saved_cost = saved_kwh * cost_per_kwh
00263|             
00264|             total_waste += waste_cost
00265|             total_saved += saved_cost
00266|             
00267|             device_details.append({
00268|                 'device_name': device['device_name'],
00269|                 'waste_cost': round(waste_cost, 2),
00270|                 'saved_cost': round(saved_cost, 2),
00271|                 'waste_power': round(waste_power, 2),
00272|                 'saved_power': round(saved_power, 2)
00273|             })

00275|         conn.close()

00278|             'status': 'success',

00280|                 'total_waste_cost': round(total_waste, 2),
00281|                 'total_saved_cost': round(total_saved, 2),
00282|                 'net_savings': round(total_saved - total_waste, 2),
00283|                 'cost_per_kwh': cost_per_kwh,
00284|                 'device_details': device_details
00285|             }
00286|         }), 200
00287|         
00288|     except Exception as e:

from flask import Flask, request, jsonify
from flask_cors import CORS
import sqlite3
from datetime import datetime

app = Flask(__name__)
CORS(app, origins=['http://localhost:8000', 'http://127.0.0.1:8000'])

DATABASE = 'ecotrack.db'

def get_db_connection():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE)
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    return conn

def init_database():
    conn = get_db_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    
    cursor.execute('''
